name: Fudgy Picnic Muffins (M_c-tc)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate with the margarine.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the flour and sugar.
3. Add the eggs and melted chocolate mixture to the flour mixture. Stir until well combined (the batter will be heavy).
4. Fold in the pecans and vanilla extract.
5. Divide the batter evenly among paper cups in a muffin pan.
6. Bake at 300°F for 40-45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
7. Makes 24 muffins that freeze well.
